/** * Configuration class to register a {@link PropertyValueConverter} with a {@link SimplePropertyValueConverterRegistry} * that can be used with {@link PropertyValueConversions}. *

* It is possible to register type safe converters via {@link #registerConverter(Class, Function)} * * 

 * registrar.registerConverter(Person.class, Person::getName) //
 * 		.writing(StringConverter::encrypt) //
 * 		.reading(StringConverter::decrypt);
 *
* * @author Christoph Strobl * @author Oliver Drotbohm * @since 2.7 */
